claim_boundary: Automated EVT0 visual/design decision log; it records CAD review acceptance and open manual checks, not CMF lock, tooling release, or production validation.
display_candidate: Chenghao CH550FH01A-CT class 5.5 inch MIPI LCD + CTP

review_views.purpose: speaker, earpiece, microphone, acoustic mesh, and port packaging
USB-C, side buttons, seals, and tactile actuation packaging
front/rear cameras, flash, baffles, cover windows, and optical seals
PCB, battery, camera, audio, haptic, and I/O placement
glass, display, shell, and component stack separation
rear-side orange shell, camera window, and service-feature review
USB-C, speaker grille, and microphone aperture review
front silhouette, orange side rail, black glass stack
left-side button protrusion and shell depth
compact footprint, screen margin, buttons, and front features
parting plane, runner, gate, ejector, and cooling placeholders
translucent rear shell review of camera window, SIM edge, and service-label recess

technical_decisions.basis: Black cover glass remains a separate bonded part over the display stack.
Front camera and earpiece are represented behind glass/acoustic gasketing for CAD packaging.
Single rear AF camera is buried under the flat back wall behind an explicit molded shell aperture and flush cover window (no bump, no proud ring); device depth was raised to fully bury the module.
USB-C insertion envelope, speaker slots, and microphone ports are modeled for mechanical review.
PCB, battery, haptic, SIM keepout, RF keepouts, shields, cameras, and audio parts are indexed.
Runner, submarine gates, ejector pins, cooling channels, and parting plane are CAD placeholders.

aesthetic_decisions.basis: Hold 78.0 x 153.6 x 11.8 mm envelope around commodity touch panel with 0.45 mm minimum nominal screen margin.
Black cover glass remains a separate bonded part over the display stack.

decisions.basis: Hold 78.0 x 153.6 x 11.8 mm envelope around commodity touch panel with 0.45 mm minimum nominal screen margin.

Single rear AF camera is buried under the flat back wall behind an explicit molded shell aperture and flush cover window (no bump, no proud ring); device depth was raised to fully bury the module.

manual_review_items: Inspect rear feature proportions in GLB/STEP before CMF lock; render distinctness is an automated coverage check, not industrial-design approval.
Confirm orange resin color, gloss, texture, knit lines, gate blush, and scratch behavior with molded samples.
Validate camera-window aesthetics, lens stack height, dust gasket, and service label placement using supplier samples.
Run tactile reviews for button travel, rattle, switch force, and snap-hook fatigue on physical samples.
Replace mesh-derived review with real supplier STEP/B-rep data and routed KiCad board STEP before tooling release.

release_rule: Automated render coverage may pass with generated nonblank views, but production visual/CMF signoff requires zero open manual review items, supplier STEP/B-rep review, molded orange resin CMF samples, and physical tactile/aesthetic review.
